eas_text: A civil authority has issued A SHELTER IN PLACE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Montcalm, MI; at 08:04 PM ON APR 14, 2026 Effective until 09:04 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A TORNADO WARNING REMAINS IN EFFECT UNTIL 1130 PM EDT FOR NORTHEASTERN IONIA AND SOUTHEASTERN MONTCALM COUNTIES a confirmed tornado was located 8 miles west of Carson City, or 10 miles south of Stanton, moving east at 20 mph. ...A TORNADO WARNING REMAINS IN EFFECT UNTIL 1130 PM EDT FOR NORTHEASTERN IONIA AND SOUTHEASTERN MONTCALM COUNTIES... a confirmed tornado was located 8 miles west of Carson City, or 10 miles south of Stanton, moving east at 20 mph
